proposal_summary: Proposal to create the UNI-ARB Grant Program (UAGP) and Protocol Delegate Program by allocating 2.2 million ARB tokens to enhance the Uniswap ecosystem on Arbitrum.

disclosed_entities.name: Uniswap
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: how the Uniswap DAO can strengthen both the Uniswap / Arbitrum ecosystems.

disclosed_entities.name: Arbitrum
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: enhance the Uniswap ecosystem on the Arbitrum Protocol.

disclosed_entities.name: Working Group Zero
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Working Group Zero (WG0) members: web3 Studios... Alastor... Doo Wan Nam... Jun Sun

disclosed_entities.name: Uniswap Foundation
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: close alignment with Uniswap Foundation to receive continuous feedback

disclosed_entities.name: Li.Fi
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Advancement of MMA. The Multi-Messaging Aggregation is a bridge-agnostic solution designed for Uniswap

disclosed_entities.name: Flashstake
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Flashstake offers a unique mechanism where users receive immediate upfront returns

disclosed_entities.name: Hal.xyz
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Hal.xyz (funded by AAVE Grant, successfully completed and acquired by Infura)

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Fund the UNI-ARB Grant Program and the Protocol Delegate Program.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: The fund allocation is 2.2 million $ARB, equally divided between Protocol Delegates and the Grants Program Sub-Working Groups.

claimed_actions.raw_action: Transfer funds to a multi-sig wallet
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Setup a co-managed wallet to cover contributor compensation and grants.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: Upon approval of the on-chain vote, funds will be transferred to a multi-sig wallet, co-managed by the named parties and Erin from the UF

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal primarily outlines the establishment of organizational structures, multisigs, and budget allocations for grants and delegation without deploying complex new smart contracts.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: funds will be transferred to a multi-sig wallet... Two separate elections will launch after the vote

limitations: No specific target on-chain addresses were provided for the fund transfers or multi-sigs, making it impossible to map out the exact transaction payload.
